title: Unhinged Carnival Supplies
description: Basically Party Supplies that might be just a little off
body:
# Introduction
Have you ever thought you would wanna do something with all those valuables? Throw a party! No one is going to bat an eye how it's going to go down as one of the weirdest party in history!

# Features
- I have no time, I am a bit unfamiliar with 1.21, and with my skill issue, for now I have added a ball you can throw for you to play dodgeball with. You can throw it at your friend. You can throw it at someone you don't like at the party of course and they will get pushed around like crazy!
![Crafting Recipe for The Ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uBNthW5Q/images/6c30a4097ded6e33b9dbb19253eaaa849adce173.png)
